name: TestNG
description: Testing framework for Java inspired by JUnit and NUnit with data providers, parallel execution, test groups and suite XML configuration.

seo.title: TestNG — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: TestNG: Testing framework for Java inspired by JUnit and NUnit with data providers, parallel execution, test groups and suite XML configuration.

when_to_use: Parallel test execution with XML suite configuration
Data provider annotation for parameterized Java tests
Test group inclusion/exclusion for selective CI runs
Dependency declaration between test methods and classes

pros: XML suite config for complex runs
cons: JUnit 5 has closed most feature gaps
review.verdict: Still strong for data-driven and parallel Java testing, though JUnit 5 is the default new choice.
review.best_for: Java teams needing complex suite orchestration and data-driven tests
review.not_for: Greenfield Java projects where JUnit 5 plus Jupiter extensions suffice
